insights: The market is currently experiencing a sharp contraction, with the total job count falling significantly below both the 7-day and 30-day moving averages in the last 48 hours.
While Unicorn-tier companies have shown stability, the rapid decline in 'Other' tier hiring suggests a broader pullback in entry-level headcount across smaller firms.
The downward trend over the last three days suggests a bearish short-term outlook as companies finalize their Q3/Q4 hiring budgets and reduce new graduate intake.
